# MLX-Gen

> MLX-Gen is a local MLX image and video generation runtime for Apple Silicon, published as
> `mlx-gen` and exposed through the `mlxgen` CLI and Python helpers.

Use these docs to understand installation, local model setup, generation routing, model
capabilities, MLX-Gen optimized quantized packages, Wan video behavior, and application integration.

Multi-output contract note: CLI batching is seed-driven. `--seed` accepts several explicit seeds,
`--auto-seeds` is available on `mlxgen generate` and `mlxgen upscale`, duplicate explicit seeds are
rejected, underlying model methods remain singular, and unified `mlxgen generate` Python families
also expose `load_generation_model(...).generate_outputs(...)` for serial multi-output reuse.

## Core Docs

- [README.md](README.md): project overview, mflux credit, install commands, published model links, Wan TI2V/A14B notes, and ecosystem links.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): index for the documentation tree.
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md): first-run workflow for install, download, prepare, image generation, image editing, SeedVR2 image/video restoration and upscaling, and Wan video.
- [docs/api.md](docs/api.md): `mlxgen` command surface, legacy-command migration boundary, generation router, public tasks, internal I2I modes, I2I canvas policy, Qwen structured control with `--controlnet-image-path`, generative reframe, backend-specific outpaint with Qwen adaptive source restoration and FLUX.2 Klein base source-locked denoising, SeedVR2 official-source and q8/q4 package usage for 3B/7B, shortest-edge/scale-factor image sizing plus video clip controls, negative prompts including the FLUX.2 exception, Qwen edit-version routing, Wan video sizes and I2V aspect-ratio behavior, route capabilities, generated-output records with runtime-memory metadata, and Python plan resolution.
- [docs/image-edit-modes.md](docs/image-edit-modes.md): plain-language guide to latent img2img, edit-reference, masked edit/inpaint, structured control, multi-reference, generative reframe, and outpaint, including what each mode preserves and what to expect from the output.
- [docs/qwen-route-matrix.md](docs/qwen-route-matrix.md): current MLX-Gen route truth for Qwen Image and Qwen Image Edit, mapping public `mlxgen` capability ids to upstream Diffusers Qwen pipelines and current proof surfaces.
- [docs/qwen-localized-editing.md](docs/qwen-localized-editing.md): plain-language comparison of Qwen masked edit, Qwen structured control, and base-Qwen control-inpaint, including ControlNet/sidecar definitions and links to the accepted proof artifacts.
- [docs/upscaling.md](docs/upscaling.md): SeedVR2 image and video restoration guide with official 3B/7B source usage, published 3B/7B q8/q4 package handles, shortest-edge and scale-factor sizing, the conservative safe-video profile, the `29/8` multi-chunk video floor, accepted five-second Eiffel `1x` and `2x` 3B/7B proof bundles with readable mode labels, reproduction commands, timings/memory data, and real 5x source/output comparisons.
- [docs/edit-capabilities.md](docs/edit-capabilities.md): image-edit and adjacent structured-control contact sheets, exact model/package statuses, and command logs for Qwen Image Edit, Qwen Image Edit 2509/2511, base Qwen structured control, FLUX.2 Klein, and latent I2I rows. FIBO Edit is unsupported through unified `mlxgen generate`.
- [docs/reframe-outpaint.md](docs/reframe-outpaint.md): `--reframe-padding` and `--outpaint-padding` workflows, the mixed June 8 profile, the current FLUX.2 Klein base source-model starship proof, exact commands, and the related validation profile ids.
- [docs/lora.md](docs/lora.md): route-specific LoRA capability fields, explicit adapter download, strict scale matching, exact adapter/base-model compatibility, source/no-LoRA/with-LoRA validation, exact public proof rows for current Qwen, Z-Image, FLUX.2, ERNIE, and Wan routes, including base Qwen latent, the exact `AbstractFramework/z-image-turbo-8bit` latent children's-drawing row, Qwen 2511 multi-reference/reframe/outpaint, FLUX.2 Klein 9B multi-reference, FLUX.2 Klein base 4B outpaint, direct `lightx2v/Wan2.2-Lightning` download, and current guidance that MLX-Gen q8 packages are the validated Lightning target rather than arbitrary external FP8 checkpoints.
- [docs/wan-video.md](docs/wan-video.md): practical Wan2.2 T2V/I2V guidance, plain and masked (`--video-mask-path`) prompt-guided A14B video-to-video with the exact reproducible proof commands and included artifacts, a measured motion-fidelity ladder (strength vs gesture preservation), the `video_strength` effective-steps contract, broader A14B target size families, and `101`-frame, 20 fps M5 Max comparison clips for A14B and TI2V-5B.
- [docs/recommendations.md](docs/recommendations.md): conservative model recommendations for `18 GB`, `24 GB`, `32 GB`, `64 GB`, and `128+ GB` Macs based on published MLX-Gen memory measurements.
- [docs/model-management.md](docs/model-management.md): explicit download/prepare commands, generation from local files, local MLX-Gen packages, matching Hugging Face handle resolution, and missing-artifact errors.
- [docs/quantization.md](docs/quantization.md): complete published package matrix, q8/q4/BF16 policies, Wan TI2V/A14B package status with the dated 2026-07-05 correction (Wan q8 is storage-only since 2026-06-12; runtime memory matches BF16), A14B q8 measured runs, Bonsai ternary support, model-family compatibility, and the distinction between MLX-Gen q8 packages and third-party FP8 checkpoint guidance.
- [docs/python-integration.md](docs/python-integration.md): embedding MLX-Gen, route-resolved runtime loading, serial multi-output reuse for unified `mlxgen generate` families, overwrite/collision behavior, SeedVR2's direct-model boundary, progress callbacks, and threading guidance.
- [docs/faq.md](docs/faq.md): common questions about tasks, image-to-image mode selection, SeedVR2 image/video sizing and default audio-preservation behavior, Qwen edit variants, negative prompts, I2I output sizing, `--image-strength`, reframe/outpaint, Wan resolutions and prompting, model preparation, package naming, and why MLX-Gen q8 Lightning guidance should not be generalized to arbitrary FP8 checkpoints.
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md): symptoms and fixes for missing files, local paths, legacy `mflux-generate-*` migration, I2I sizing, unsupported options, Wan video settings, route-specific LoRA issues, and transfer issues.

## Examples

- [docs/examples/spaceship-snow.md](docs/examples/spaceship-snow.md): reproducible model-backed T2I, I2I edit, multi-reference I2I, T2V A14B, and I2V A14B workflow with included assets.

## Operations

- [docs/huggingface-publishing.md](docs/huggingface-publishing.md): generated model cards, upload commands, and AbstractFramework repository naming.
- [docs/release.md](docs/release.md): release checklist, GitHub Release flow, and PyPI publishing.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): user-visible release history.

## Project

- [ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md](ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md): upstream mflux credit and model/community acknowledgements.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, checks, documentation expectations, and pull-request scope.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting and token/model safety guidance.
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): participation expectations.
- [docs/adr/README.md](docs/adr/README.md): architecture decision records, including model-backed smoke validation policy.
